name: ProcurementAgent
description: Autonomous procurement agent that monitors Jodhpur mandi prices via eNAM and executes buy orders when profitable spreads are detected. Uses X402 protocol for on-chain payments.

capabilities.name: monitor_prices
capabilities.description: Monitors Jodhpur Tur Dal prices in real-time via SSE stream. Calculates running average, detects dips below target threshold.

capabilities.name: execute_purchase
capabilities.description: Places buy order at Jodhpur mandi when price is favorable. Uses X402 payment from business contract escrow.

capabilities.name: assess_spread
capabilities.description: Compares Jodhpur buy price vs Mumbai sell price to determine if arbitrage spread is profitable after freight costs.
